DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT DOW PHARMACEUTICAL SCIENCES, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM DEPOSING (1) CEO OF VALEANT PHARMACEUTICALS INTERNATIONAL; (2) CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS OF VALEANT PHARMACEUTICALS INTERNATIONAL; AND (3) PERSON DESIGNATED AS THE MOST QUALIFIED TO TESTIFY BY MATTHEWS MEDIA GROUP, INC. IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER BARRING THE DEPOSITION OF THE CEO OF VALEANT PHARMACEUTICALS INTERNATIONAL. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS IT SEEKS TO BAR THE DEPOSITIONS OF THE CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS OF VALEANT PHARMACEUTICALS INTERNATIONAL AND PERSON DESIGNATED AS THE MOST QUALIFIED TO TESTIFY BY MATTHEWS MEDIA GROUP, INC. BY THIS ORDER THE COURT DOES NOT MAKE ANY FINDINGS AS TO ANY INDIVIDUAL CATEGORY OF THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITIONS. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Prohibiting Pltf Numoda Corporation From Deposing: 1) Ceo Of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International; 2) Custodian Of Records Of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International; 3) Person(S) Designated As The Most Qualified To Testify By Matthews Media Group, Inc.; And Request For Sanctions Against Pltf And Its Counse;
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Anna S. McLean, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Dow Pharmaceutical Sciences
Paul S. Rosenlund, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Numoda Corporation

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Dow Pharmaceutical Sciences, Inc.'s Motion For Protective Order Prohibiting Plaintiff From Deposing (1) CEO Of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International; (2) Custodian Of Records Of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International; and (3) Person Designated As The Most Qualified To Testify By Matthews Media Group, Inc. is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks an order barring the deposition of the CEO of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International. The motion is denied as it seeks to bar the depositions of the Custodian of Records of Valeant Pharmaceuticals International and Person Designated As The Most Qualified To Testify By Matthews Media Group, Inc. By this order the court does not make any findings as to any individual category of the Notice of Depositions. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiff is ordered to respond further and to produce further within 15 days of notice of this order. The order to produce includes the Power Point slides. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
